_instructions: About section content - professional summary and grounded highlights.
content: I am a supply chain analyst with experience supporting inventory planning, logistics coordination, procurement operations, warehouse reporting, and supply chain analytics. My work centers on making operational data easier to trust and act on.

I use Excel, SQL, Power BI, Python, and ERP data to analyze inventory movement, shipment performance, supplier activity, and operational KPIs. I collaborate with procurement, logistics, warehouse, and planning teams on reporting, reconciliation, fulfillment, and demand-planning support.
